sections.paragraph:
(of a form which takes dagesh, for חַדָּשׁ) constr. חָרַשׁ ( Exo 28:11 Isa 44:12, 13 Isa 44:13compare פָּרָשׁ constr. פָּרַשׁ Eze 26:10)-

(1) an engraver, of stones, Exo 21:11.

(2) an artificer, of iron, brass, stone, wood [a smith, mason, or carpenter], Exo 35:35 Deu 27:15 sometimes more fully, חָרַשׁ בַּרְזֶל an artificer of iron. Isa 44:12, חָרַשׁ עֵצִים an artificer of wood, ib. verse 13 Isa 44:13 2Sa 5:11 1Ch 14:1 22:15 . Metaph. חָרָשֵׁי מַשְׁחִית artificer of destruction, Eze. 21:36 .
